title: Seeds of Life Lance of Longinus Tree of Life Instrumentality
display_title: Seeds of Life Lance of Longinus Tree of Life Instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: Seeds of Life/Lance of Longinus/Tree of Life/Instrumentality             Quote Post by Skullraper » Sat Oct 13, 2007 12:25 am It is my hope that the following speculation serves as a continuation of my previous post “First Ancestral Race and posthumanism” . I recommend reading that post BEFORE you read this one. Don’t worry; it’s not as long as this one! You should be familiar with the Classified Information and the Theatrical Program Books before you read this. I will attempt to divulge my own theories in a coherent way. My main references for this speculation are the Classified Information and Brendan Jamieson’s Evangelion FAQ. Keep in mind that this is my own SPECULATION and nothing more. For the purpose of grammar I will refer to members of the First Ancestral Race as First Ancestors (FA). Seeds of Life resembling Adam: Adam types Seeds of Life resembling Lilith: Lilith types GNR: “Giant Naked Rei” seen in EoE SoL: Seed of Life FAR: First Ancestral Race Geofronts / Seeds of Life / Instrumentality The geofronts were created by the FAR to house the Seeds of Life which they sent into space. They are perfectly spherical cavities created inside average sized moons. The cavities may or may not be filled with rock. The process of creating the cavity of the geofront may involve the controlled creation of a powerful AT field. This AT field might be generated by the Seed of Life in question while it is being placed in its moon. The SoL might not do this voluntarily as it is under the control of the FAR by means of their Lances of Longinus. The FAR probably created the Seeds of Life from their own bodies and souls. In the universe of Evangelion souls of great power or “size” can divide into “smaller” souls. Perhaps this could be likened to a bacterial cell dividing to form a colony. In EoE Misato is heard reflecting on instrumentality. From this we learn that SEELE believes humanity has become “a colony of flawed and separate entities”. The Red Cross Book expounds on this statement. “Colony means a group of individual organisms linked to each other, with new individual organisms produced by splitting or budding. Each individual organism within the colony has the capability to live independently.” Each Seed of Life possesses a Chamber of Gaf. We have already seen in the series that an AT field is capable of creating a pocket dimension (Sea of Dirac). The Chamber of Gaf is probably of a similar nature. After a SoL has a soul implanted the FAR condition that soul to create a pocket dimension within itself. Then the Seed of Life’s soul is fragmented into potentially trillions of individual souls. These budded souls are made to reside in the Chamber of Gaf of that particular Seed of Life. They remain their until the Seed of Life lands on a prospective colony world. When the SoL begins to produce progeny the souls in its Chamber of Gaf are born into bodies. The Seed of Life always retains a “large” fragment of the original soul. This serves as its native soul. Seeds of Life come in two known forms. Each form produces unique offspring which possess only half of the godhood of the FAR (SEE MY PREVIOUS POST) . The souls of each SoL are also specifically conditioned by the FAR so they exhibit or lack the desired god trait. The souls of Adam types and their offspring the angels are largely devoid of sentience and emotional reasoning. This is why the angels lack the “Fruit of Knowledge”. Adam types and their offspring the angels possess the “Fruit of Life” instead. This is the S^2 engine. Thus the “Fruit of Life” is a physical construct which grants the angels immortality. The souls of Lilith types and their offspring the lilim possess the “Fruit of Knowledge”. This is equivalent to science and the potential to build machines that manipulate matter and energy. The lilim are not immortal so they perpetuate themselves through experience, adaptation, and evolution. The production of lilim based life requires an ecosystem of exacting specifications. This initially takes the form of LCL which is produced by Lilith types. LCL is essentially biomass in a purely undifferentiated form. It is not structured by the presence of an AT field. Within this nutritious soup simple life forms begin to grow. This eventually culminates in the evolution of intelligent civilized beings (mankind). Lilith types are capable of producing LCL because they seemingly lack souls and have tissues undifferentiated by an AT field. I believe the FAR condition them this way. After being placed in a geofront a Lilith type has its soul forced into its own Chamber of Gaf. With its soul essentially disconnected from its body the Lilith type produces LCL as a body fluid. The crucifix motif may refer to Lilith’s “sacrifice”. There is much evidence for the involvement of the FAR in this process. Throughout the series we catch glimpses of the deepest parts of the geofront. It is filled with strange caverns and structures which I doubt are of human origin. These include huge “honeycomb”, enormous vaults, and perfectly sculpted Sephirot shaped vats. Lilith herself is restrained in a curious way which doesn’t suggest human intervention. Instead, human structures seem to have been built into the existing alien structures. Construction of the Evangelions required some kind of soul manipulating technology which isn’t seen in the series. Perhaps this technology was reverse engineered from artifacts found in the geofront. The Sephirot vats are of specific interest. In a cryptic flashback image we see Lilith inside the largest of these vats seemingly birthing unit-01. That same vat would later be used to dump the failed eva prototypes. I believe Lilith was originally housed in that vat when she was first restrained there by the FAR eons ago. The structure of Lilith’s geofront seems to be suited for storing and channeling the endless stream of LCL she produces. From the Sephirot vats the LCL then flows into the “salt pillar” room. This is where Earthly life was first cultivated in the form of bacterial cells. After landing on a prospective planet like Earth LCL is somehow channeled out of the geofront and onto the planet surface. From these primordial pools the entire planet is seeded with life. Later when she was discovered by humans, Lilith’s vat was drained of LCL. Then after unit-01 was “born” she was moved to another part of the geofront along with her red “cross” and erected vertically. It is less clear how Adam types produce angels. We know for certain that the angels receive an S^2 engine from Adam. Because of this the angels do not require a specific habitat in order to thrive. LCL is unnecessary to angels. Instrumentality is an ability inherent to all Seeds of Life. Its exact purpose is only hinted at. During instrumentality the SoL resets and calibrates the global environment with its AT field. The end result is an environment specifically suited for that SoL’s offspring. Secondarily, an anti-AT field is generated resulting in the recalling of all souls to the Chamber of Gaf. Alternatively, all souls could be released from the chamber at once. Lilith can only perform instrumentality if her soul is reinserted into her body. In its most natural form the process of instrumentality would seem to function as a global reset button. Perhaps the FAR prepared this as a precaution in the event that two Seeds of Life landed on one planet. The FAR would want to avoid this as the lilim’s “Fruit of Knowledge” could allow them to possess the angel’s “Fruit of Life”. The result would be the Evangelions. Earth is an example of this. In the case of Earth Lilith is the interloper. The Lances of Longinus have supreme authority over the Seeds of Life. Lilith’s lance may be missing because it decided to leave the decision to Adam’s lance. Perhaps Lilith’s lance left Earth or self-destructed. Without the protection of the lance Lilith and her offspring would be subject to the decisions of Adam’s lance. Adam is permitted by his lance to perform instrumentality and extinct the lilim invaders. This event is predicted in the Dead Sea Scrolls. The Dead Sea Scrolls might be a scenario manual created by the FAR. With SEELE in possession of it they are able to predict and calculate every event that is going to happen. The FAR didn’t predict that human ingenuity would be capable of overriding this process. The 2nd and 3rd impacts seen in the series are instances of instrumentality being manipulated to a different end by mankind. During the 2nd impact Adam awakens. “He” then attempts to reset the Earth for “his” children the angels by removing the lilim. Due to human intervention “he” only half succeeded. In episode #21 we learn that the Katsuragi expedition had attached some kind of thermal dampening device (a product of science) to Adam. They activate it the moment Adam opens “his” Chamber of Gaf to release the souls of “his” angels. Later we see red dots of light and streaks of light rising and falling around Adam’s wings. I believe these are the souls of unborn angels that are dying from the “thermal dampening treatment”. Thermal dampening also seems to absorb the majority of Adam’s AT field energy. It was SEELE’s goal all along to minimize the damage caused by Adam's instrumentality. This is revealed to us by Misato’s monologue in EoE. They largely succeed in that they halted the complete reforming of Earth and killed all the unborn angels in Adam’s Chamber of Gaf. Only angels born before 2nd impact are left alive. Gendo’s plans for instrumentality obviously run counter to SEELE’s. Gendo is able to manipulate the plans for instrumentality by manipulating the people around him. He first seems to manipulate Yui so he can get closer to SEELE. He then manipulates Naoko to get closer to Project E. Next he manipulates Ritsuko to further cement his control over NERV. After that he manipulates his son so he can utilize unit-01. Finally he manipulates Lilith herself by creating Rei. At some point after the death of Yui he has Lilith’s soul extracted from her Chamber of Gaf and placed inside a synthetic body. This is Rei. After this the Chamber of Gaf is empty. Lilith’s soul was the last one inhabiting the Chamber of Gaf. Rei-2 only possesses half of Lilith’s soul. Gendo has the other half placed in the core of unit-00. Gendo is now able to control Lilith by emotionally manipulating Rei and having her pilot unit-00. Gendo keeps Lilith’s soul splintered so she is easier to control. When her soul is complete (Rei-3) she is able to reject Gendo and act of her own free will. Lance of Longinus / Tree of Life The Lances of Longinus are almost gods in their own right and are only second to the FAR in terms of power. The lances also serve the FAR and carry out their will when they are absent. They insure that the will of the FAR is enforced during the life and mission of a Seed of Life. Perhaps the lances which are paired with SoLs are responsible for guiding the geofronts to prospective colony worlds. The fact that two landed on Earth may have been due to an error in judgment on the part of the lance accompanying Lilith. As I said before, the reason why Lilith’s lance is absent may be because it decided to give Adam’s lance full authority in the matter of removing lilim from Earth. The lances may actually be fragments of First Ancestors. I got this impression from EoE when the Tree of Life is manifested. The Tree appears when both the “Fruit of Knowledge” and “Fruit of Life” are fused into one being. Essentially the Tree is equal to an FA. Perhaps the Tree of Life is one of many avatars the FAR possesses. The lance appears to be a “branch” that was broken off from the Tree. The lance and the Tree have an identical helical texture. The lance appears to exhibit “an ego without restriction” or the infinite AT field of a god. It shares this trait with its creators the FAR. Throughout the series the lance is never described as having an AT field. This may be because the perimeter of it’s AT field extends to infinity and is thus not measurable by NERV’s equipment. All lesser AT fields lie within the lance’s field and are subject to the lance’s influence. This possibly explains the lance’s ability to control the Seeds of Life and penetrate any AT field. The lance’s power is demonstrated in EoE when it senses unit-01’s awakening and subsequently paralyses her. In all previous instances of unit-01 gaining free will she was capable of killing or destroying any obstacle. However, the lance deactivates her in a matter of seconds. This is a testament to the lance’s authority. Its reason for suppressing unit-01 isn’t clear. Perhaps it considered unit-01 a Seed of Life that had stepped beyond her rights. Throughout the series only two forces are obvious. These are Mankind and the Angels. However, the lance is a powerful yet subtle third presence throughout the series. The lance is also crucial to instrumentality. It is crucial because instrumentality only occurs with the lance’s permission. Without the lances consent instrumentality can’t occur because no entity, not even a Seed of Life can overrule its judgments. SEELE’s scenario for instrumentality involved overriding the lance’s authority by either manipulating it with the Evas and/or overpowering it with unit-01. Because the lance will only submit to an FA the Evas where created so that SEELE could masquerade as FAs and overrule the lance. Ultimately, SEELE’s plans run counter to the desires of the FAR. Eventually the lance is overpowered by unit-01 (SEE MY PREVOIUS POST) . SEELE originally wanted to use the lance in conjunction with Lilith to achieve instrumentality. Lilith can only perform instrumentality if her soul (or maybe a soul equally as powerful) is reinserted into her body. Only then can she generate an anti-AT field. If SEELE hadn’t lost the lance they could’ve used it to force Lilith’s soul back into her body. With the lance gone they instead use unit-01 who can substitute for Lilith without the lance because she already has a soul. She can also overpower the lance (though not at first). Unbeknownst to SEELE, Rei-3 (who contains Lilith’s complete soul) returns to Lilith by choice and becomes the GNR. If Rei hadn’t returned to Lilith GNR wouldn’t have appeared and SEELE would have maintained full control of instrumentality. All human souls would have returned to the Egg of Lilith (Lilith’s Chamber of Gaf) as seen in EoE. However, with SEELE in control and not Shinji the egg would have “hatched” instead of being destroyed and a new god would have been born to “guide the elite (SEELE) to a nearly divine place”. Unfortunately for SEELE, Rei decides to give Shinji the power to decide instrumentality’s outcome. He chooses to reject instrumentality and the false happiness it entails. As a result the egg is destroyed. The souls of humanity once again manifest AT fields and individuals are able to differentiate themselves. The dead can even resurrect themselves if they are able to manifest their bodies in the sea of LCL. Galactic Hierarchy (applicable to my previous post as well) First Ancestral Race==>Lance of Longinus==>Seeds of Life==>Angels / Lilim

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Oct 13, 2007 6:10 am Skim reading it, that's about right. It links everything together quite well. One irk though, "extinct" is not a verb.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Oct 13, 2007 10:49 am Gret theory...again makes a lot of sense and clars up some stuff once again My two cents: What if FAR put two seeds of life onto "Earth" to see the results? Possibly to see which is the stronger SoL Im in diubt that the FAR (as intelligent/first known beings to "complete" evolution would make a mistake of that magnitude But thats just my speculation to not so much theory

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Oct 20, 2007 7:41 am This really is a good theory, but it's a lot of reading. There's some stuff there that I disagree with, or atleast have different theories about, but I'm not in the mood to bring them up now. Bump for your well thought out theory though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 20, 2007 4:17 pm *blinks* wow

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Oct 20, 2007 9:53 pm Skull, while this may sound strange coming from me of all people, you should try and keep your posts down a bit in length, or at least use paragraphs. A wall of text can be very offputting.

I recommend reading that post BEFORE you read this one. Don’t worry; it’s not as long as this one! You should be familiar with the Classified Information and the Theatrical Program B
